# ZendeskTicketSensor

Uses Zendesk's Incremental Tickets export API to find tickets created or updated since the cursor. Triggers a RunRequest per new ticket. Token-authed.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `sensor_name` | `str` | Unique sensor name. |
| `asset_keys` | `List[str]` | Slash-separated asset keys to materialize when an event matches. |
| `subdomain` | `str` | Zendesk subdomain (e.g. 'mycompany' for mycompany.zendesk.com). |
| `email` | `str` | Zendesk user email used with the API token. |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `api_token_env_var` | `str` | `"ZENDESK_API_TOKEN"` | Env var with the Zendesk API token. |

### Sensor configuration

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `minimum_interval_seconds` | `int` | `60` | Minimum seconds between sensor evaluations. |
| `default_status` | `str` | `"STOPPED"` | 'RUNNING' or 'STOPPED'. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `statuses` | `List[str]` | — | Optional ticket statuses to filter on (e.g. ['new', 'open']). |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML
```yaml
type: dagster_component_templates.ZendeskTicketSensorComponent
attributes:
  sensor_name: zendesk_new_ticket_sensor
  asset_keys: [support_ticket_features]
  subdomain: mycompany
  email: ops@mycompany.com
  api_token_env_var: ZENDESK_API_TOKEN
  statuses: [new, open]
  minimum_interval_seconds: 300
```

## Requirements

```
requests
```
